name: bb_bounce_gold_m15
hypothesis: XAUUSD M15 three-bar Bollinger bounce (pierce-and-reclaim) is a high-R reversion pattern when volatility is elevated but not extreme. The reclaim bar confirms absorption of the sweep.

rules: LONG: bar[-2].close > lower_bb; bar[-1].low < lower_bb (pierce); bar[0].close > lower_bb (reclaim); RSI(14) < 40
SHORT: mirror on upper band; RSI(14) > 60

exit.tp: middle BB at 0.5R min, opposite BB at full target; partial 50% at middle
